# `cc-journal backfill`

- **Usage**: `cc-journal backfill [--days <DAYS>] [--dry-run]`

Retroactively summarize recent sessions

## Flags

### `--days <DAYS>`

Number of days to look back

**Default:** `30`

### `--dry-run`

Show what would be summarized without writing
